subcodes.first_line: O summoner to the Kingdom of God! I have falled short in my correspondence, and the reason for that suspension is this grievous war. Think not that hou leavest my mind
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منادی بملکوت الله در تحریر تقصیر واقع و سبب تعطیل اینحرب شدید گمان منما که
subcodes.subjects: @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @love of God
